$ADBE Q1 2026: Revenue $6.4B, +12% YoY. Earnings beat. Stock near 2018 price levels.

CEO exiting after 18 years. Google launched Stitch to compete with core design products.

Goldman Sachs target: $220. Analyst consensus: Hold. Burry just went long.

One of these groups is about to look very wrong.

Beat earnings. Stock drops 5%.
Miss earnings. Stock drops 12%.
In-line earnings. Stock drops 3%.

We're in a market where results aren't rewarded — only guidance changes matter. $MU beat Q2 and fell. $ADBE beat Q1 and fell.

Earnings don't move stocks anymore. Expectations do.
